name: Studio Performance Overview (All-in-One)
prompt: Give me a report on my revenue, my visit count, and my membership count. Include a narrative summary first, a line chart of daily revenue, a bar chart of daily class attendance visits, and a donut chart of membership plan distribution.

name: Financial & Revenue Summary
prompt: Give me a detailed financial report showing total realized revenue, a breakdown of revenue by source (membership, product, booking) as a donut chart, and a line chart of daily revenue trends.
